channel.title: SnailSploit — Security Research
channel.description: AI security research, adversarial AI, LLM jailbreaking, prompt injection, CVE disclosures, and offensive security by Kai Aizen.

item.title: CVE-2026-33693: SSRF in activitypub-federation-rust
item.description: SSRF bypass via 0.0.0.0 in ActivityPub federation library. Missing is_unspecified() check affects Lemmy and 6+ Fediverse projects. CVSS 6.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-32885: Path Traversal (ZipSlip) in ddev
item.description: ZipSlip path traversal in ddev. Malicious archives escape extraction directory via Untar/Unzip without path containment. CVSS 6.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-32809: Symlink Resolution Bypass in ouch
item.description: Unvalidated symlink targets in tar extraction enable arbitrary file read via crafted archives. Affects all tar formats. CVSS 7.4 High.

item.title: Self-Replicating Memory Worm: Persistent Injection with Autonomous Propagation
item.description: A single memory edit becomes an autonomous, self-replicating worm — generational escalation, credential harvesting, cross-service pivoting via Notion and MCP, and indefinite persistence across session resets.

item.title: Linux Kernel io_uring/zcrx: Race Condition to Double-Free
item.description: Race condition in io_uring zerocopy receive — non-atomic user_refs operations lead to double-free and out-of-bounds write. Linux kernel commit by Kai Aizen, backported to stable.

item.title: Adversarial Prompting: The Complete Technical Guide
item.description: Every adversarial prompting technique mapped — from role hijacking to multi-turn escalation to indirect injection. How attacks work, why defenses fail, and what the taxonomy looks like from the attacker's side.

item.title: LLM Jailbreak Techniques: A Technical Taxonomy
item.description: Complete taxonomy of LLM jailbreak techniques — role hijacking, multi-turn escalation, context manipulation, encoding exploits, and chain-of-thought abuse.

item.title: Prompt Injection Examples: Real Attack Patterns Explained
item.description: Real-world prompt injection examples across direct injection, indirect injection, MCP tool poisoning, and memory attacks.

item.title: Memory Injection Through Nested Skills: Autonomous LLM Agent Compromise
item.description: A novel persistence chain exploiting trust boundaries in LLM agent frameworks — skill injection + memory poisoning = self-healing, autonomous implant.

item.title: CVE-2026-3288: Configuration Injection in ingress-nginx
item.description: Configuration injection via rewrite-target annotation in ingress-nginx. RCE and cluster-wide Secret disclosure. CVSS 8.8.

item.title: Weaponized AI Supply Chain: How Threat Actors Turned LLMs Into Attack Infrastructure
item.description: 89% increase in AI-enabled attacks. How threat actors weaponize LLM supply chains — from model poisoning to MCP tool injection.

item.title: MCP vs A2A Attack Surface: Every Trust Boundary Mapped
item.description: MCP has 30+ CVEs and real-world breaches. A2A has zero. Side-by-side attack surface comparison with defensive guidance.

item.title: The 30% Blind Spot: Why LLM Safety Judges Fail
item.description: I built an LLM safety judge. Six iterations, 680+ responses. It passed — while missing 63% of unsafe content.

item.title: AATMF v3.1 vs MITRE ATLAS: Which AI Security Framework Wins?
item.description: MITRE ATLAS: 66 techniques. AATMF v3.1: 240 techniques, 4,980+ prompts, quantitative risk scoring.

item.title: LLM Red Teamer's Playbook: Diagnosing AI Defense Layers
item.description: A systematic methodology for diagnosing LLM defense layers and selecting bypass techniques that actually work.

item.title: AI Breach Detection Gap: The Logs Are Clean. You're Not.
item.description: 74% of organizations found AI breaches when they looked. Most are not looking.

item.title: Computational Countertransference: LLM Context Inheritance
item.description: LLMs adopt adversarial states from pasted transcripts. 13-month study reveals context inheritance as an architectural vulnerability.

item.title: AI Coding Agent Attack Surface: A Full Taxonomy
item.description: AI coding agents trust code comments, README files, and MCP servers the same way humans trust authority.

item.title: AI Gateway Threat Model: 8 Attack Vectors
item.description: First generalized AI gateway threat model covering 8 unmapped attack vectors. 91K attack sessions analyzed.

item.title: Agentic AI Threat Landscape: Attack Vectors & Defenses
item.description: Full agentic AI threat landscape: prompt injection, MCP tool poisoning, multi-agent infection, memory poisoning.

item.title: CVE-2026-1208: CSRF in Friendly Functions for Welcart
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery in Friendly Functions for Welcart WordPress plugin. Settings manipulation. CVSS 4.3.

item.title: Memory Manipulation: AI Context Poisoning
item.description: How attackers poison AI context windows and memory systems to compromise future interactions.

item.title: RAG, Agentic AI, and the New Attack Surface
item.description: Understanding the expanded attack surface of RAG systems and agentic AI.

item.title: AI Social Engineering: Deepfake Voice Detection
item.description: How AI enables sophisticated social engineering through deepfake voices. Detection techniques and organizational defense.

item.title: MCP Security Hardening: Production Vulnerability Guide
item.description: How to secure MCP servers in production AI environments.

item.title: Zero-Trust Container Runtime Attestation
item.description: Implementing zero-trust principles in container runtime environments.

item.title: MCP Threat Analysis: Attack Chains & Protocol Dissection
item.description: Offensive threat analysis of the Model Context Protocol.

item.title: Custom Instruction Backdoor: ChatGPT Prompt Injection
item.description: Uncovering emergent prompt injection risks through ChatGPT custom instructions.

item.title: AI-Powered Obfuscator Bypasses Detection in 2 Hours
item.description: Building a cloud-based obfuscator using AI that bypasses security detection.

item.title: Advanced Container Escapes: Security Deep Dive
item.description: Deep technical analysis of container escape techniques.

item.title: Inherent AI Vulnerabilities: Technical Deep Dive
item.description: Technical analysis of structural vulnerabilities in AI systems.

item.title: RCE & DNS Exfiltration in ChatGPT Canvas
item.description: Python Pickle RCE and DNS exfiltration in ChatGPT Code Interpreter sandbox.

item.title: The Structural Vulnerabilities of Large Language Models
item.description: Tokenization evasion, parsing limits, and alignment failure modes in production AI.

item.title: Evading Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR)
item.description: Technical analysis of EDR evasion techniques.

item.title: CVE-2025-12030: IDOR in ACF to REST API Plugin
item.description: IDOR in ACF to REST API WordPress plugin. Unauthorized data access. CVSS 4.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-12163: Stored XSS in OmniPress Plugin
item.description: Stored XSS in OmniPress WordPress plugin via author-level access. CVSS 6.4.

item.title: CVE-2025-9776: SQL Injection in CatFolders Plugin
item.description: Authenticated SQL Injection via CSV Import in CatFolders WordPress plugin. CVSS 6.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-11171: Missing Auth in Chartify Plugin
item.description: Missing authentication for admin functions in Chartify WordPress plugin. CVSS 5.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-11174: Missing Auth in Document Library Lite
item.description: Missing authorization in Document Library Lite exposes sensitive data. CVSS 5.3.

item.title: Context Inheritance Exploit: Persistent Jailbreaks
item.description: Discovering how jailbroken states persist across GPT sessions through context inheritance.

item.title: Is AI Inherently Vulnerable? An Offensive Analysis
item.description: Examining the fundamental security limitations of large language models.

item.title: Embracing AI: Adapt or Die in Cybersecurity
item.description: Why security professionals must embrace AI or risk irrelevance.

item.title: Your Personal Data Is for Sale: New Identity Theft
item.description: Investigating the personal data marketplace and its implications for identity theft.

item.title: Exploiting Cloud Vulnerabilities: Tools and Techniques
item.description: Practical guide to cloud security testing across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

item.title: Hidden Risks of AI: An Offensive Security Perspective
item.description: Emerging AI threat vectors from an offensive security perspective.

item.title: ChatGPT Jailbreak via Context Manipulation
item.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of jailbreaking ChatGPT using context and social awareness techniques.
